lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, used to validate the cargo-fit slot layout and laden range for this trade build.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Anaconda ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative optional-internal and military slot sizes that set this hull's maximum cargo capacity.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Anaconda shipyard page — hull stats, cargo capacity, module sellers, and where to buy and outfit it.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Anaconda article — Faulcon DeLacy manufacture, role profile, and the no-rank availability noted for trading.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Review of the Anaconda as a large hull, weighing its capacity and versatility against dedicated freighters.
